label: Neuromorphic, sensor & edge intelligence

node.label: Neuromorphic, sensor & edge intelligence
node.definition: Edge and neuromorphic intelligence performs sensing, inference, adaptation, or control on constrained devices using efficient conventional or event-driven hardware.
node.why_it_matters: This system is an application boundary where technical capability, evidence, safety controls, economics, and user workflow must succeed together.
examples: workflows combining Neuromorphic, sensor & edge intelligence with Spiking neural networks
workflows combining Neuromorphic, sensor & edge intelligence with Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment
workflows combining Neuromorphic, sensor & edge intelligence with Spiking neurons & temporal coding
limitations: End-to-end quality is bounded by the weakest data, model, tool, interface, policy, infrastructure, and human-oversight component. Its direct dependencies include Spiking neural networks, Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment.

dependencies.rationale: Neuromorphic, sensor & edge intelligence integrates Spiking neural networks as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
In this atlas graph, Neuromorphic, sensor & edge intelligence has an `applies` dependency on Edge, on-device & neuromorphic deployment with `core` strength.
Neuromorphic, sensor & edge intelligence integrates Spiking neurons & temporal coding as part of an end-to-end application boundary.
In this atlas graph, Neuromorphic, sensor & edge intelligence has an `applies` dependency on Reservoir computing (ESN / LSM) with `common` strength.
